items.name_en: PETIT FLOT MINI is a refined mini version of the PETIT FLOT PM. Lightweight and compact, it retains the iconic bucket silhouette. The exquisite leather shoulder strap allows for easy switching between handbag, shoulder bag, and crossbody styles, showcasing its practical and versatile nature.

Store bestseller 🔥
goyard hobo zip tote 🤍 White + Red Heart ♥️
Went to develop a second one I bought
I always trust Goyard's tote shape
Elegant, French, and casual for daily wear
The single shoulder strap makes the lines clean and sharp
No drag at all
Made it to my top of the year list~
Handles and trim are top-grain leather
Please distinguish from market PU❌
